author: Stanislav German-Evtushenko
message:
Fix Ubuntu 24.04 shutdown hang with synced folders (#13804)

Fix Ubuntu 24.04 shutdown hang by preventing vagrant from mounting already mounted synced folders. Fixes #13795.
